first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections remains substantively the same. Minor differences in wording, such as mentioning 'cultural/structural fit' or 'compensation expectations,' are direct and reasonable elaborations on the core, unchanged concern of the candidate being overqualified for an entry-level role. These changes are well within the bounds of run-to-run noise and are not tied to the change in location from Berlin to São Paulo.
